game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: EvoCreo 2 is a turn-based monster collection RPG where players, as a novice trainer, navigate an open world by tapping on the screen to move their character and interact with NPCs. The core loop involves encountering wild Creo, initiating turn-based battles where players select actions like "Attack," "Skill," or "Switch Creo" from a UI menu, aiming to capture them by reducing their health and using specific capture items. Captured Creo can be trained and evolved indefinitely, gaining access to over 200 skills and 100 traits, which players strategically assign to customize their team of up to 6 Creo with roles like tank or support. Progression involves completing over 50 story missions, uncovering conspiracies, and challenging increasingly difficult trainers and legendary Creo across diverse biomes, culminating in Coliseum battles to climb rankings and optimize builds for endgame content.
game_info.description: You are a novice Creo trainer embarking on an adventure to capture and train powerful creatures called Creo. Navigate through diverse biomes, battle wild Creo and rival trainers, and build your ultimate team. Capture Creo by weakening them in battle and using capture items. Train your team, unlock new skills, and prove yourself as the ultimate Creo master by defeating all challengers!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move character in the overworld / Navigate menu options in battle
Z Key: Interact with NPCs/objects / Confirm menu selection
Space: Cancel/back in menus
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and interaction mechanics. Validates that the player can move around the overworld, trigger encounters, and interact with the battle system without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move randomly around the map to trigger wild Creo encounters. In battles, use basic attacks to defeat enemies. Test menu navigation and battle flow.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully navigates the overworld, enters battles, and completes combat encounters without crashes. The game state transitions correctly between exploration and battle phases.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully navigates the overworld, enters battles, and completes combat encounters without crashes. The game state transitions correctly between exploration and battle phases.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the win condition by implementing an optimal strategy to complete story missions and defeat all trainers. This validates the full game progression from start to victory.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate to story NPCs to accept missions. Battle wild Creo and trainers strategically, using type advantages and skills. Capture Creo to build a diverse team. Progress through all story content to reach the final battle.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete all story missions, defeat the final boss, and trigger the GAME_OVER_WIN state. The game recognizes victory and displays the win screen with final statistics.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests Creo capture mechanics and team management. Validates that players can capture wild Creo, manage their team roster, and switch between Creo in battle.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Engage wild Creo encounters and weaken them to low health. Use capture items to attempt captures. Build a team of multiple Creo and test switching between them during battles.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully capture multiple Creo, add them to the team roster, and demonstrate the ability to switch active Creo during combat. Team management UI works correctly.
TEST_3.description: Tests Creo capture mechanics and team management. Validates that players can capture wild Creo, manage their team roster, and switch between Creo in battle.
TEST_3.strategy: Engage wild Creo encounters and weaken them to low health. Use capture items to attempt captures. Build a team of multiple Creo and test switching between them during battles.
TEST_3.expected: Successfully capture multiple Creo, add them to the team roster, and demonstrate the ability to switch active Creo during combat. Team management UI works correctly.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests skill learning and strategic combat. Validates that Creo gain experience, learn new skills, and that different skill types work correctly in battle.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Battle multiple enemies to gain experience. Test different skill types including damage skills, status effects, and buff/debuff abilities. Validate damage calculations and effect applications.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Creo successfully gain experience and level up, learning new skills. Different skill types produce expected effects in combat, and the battle system handles complex interactions correctly.
